import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  match tok
  when Some(t)
    let parsed = string.parse_int(t)
    match parsed
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
    end
  when None
  end
  i = i + 1
end
print("positive=#{count}")
